email_sender.title: Email sender
email_sender.tooltip: Use your own domain to send emails, so messages come from your brand instead of a generic address. This improves trust and deliverability.
email_sender.banner_success_body: Instruction is on their way to {{email}}. Verify your email right now to finalize the process!
email_sender.banner_error_body: Please verify your email to continue saving!
email_sender.banner_timeout_body: We've sent the instructions to {{email}}. You can resend them in {{seconds}} seconds.
email_sender.free_banner_body: 🎁 Customize your email sender name for free! <1>Contact us</1>
email_sender.invalid_email: Your email is invalid or doesn't exist

referral_share.title: Referral - sharing URL customization
referral_share.tooltip: Customize the domain of your referral links (e.g., <1>share.yourstore.com</1>) so they look professional and match your brand.
referral_share.link_example: The referral link could be like this: https://{{domain}}/d29azDx

modal.title: Referral – Sharing URL Customization
modal.step_1: Contact us to get the <1>IP address of our sharing service.</1>
modal.step_2: Follow <1>this guide</1> to point your domain/subdomain to our service.
modal.step_3: Let us know once you're done, along with the <1>sharing URL</1> you've chosen.
modal.step_4: We'll verify and activate you <1>referral sharing URL.</1>

custom_portal.title: Affiliate - portal domain customization
custom_portal.tooltip: Set up a custom domain for your affiliate portal (e.g., <1>partners.yourstore.com</1>) to give affiliates a branded login and management experience.
custom_portal.link_example: The portal link will be like this: {{url}}/{{subpath}}

modal.title: Affiliate - Portal Domain Customization
modal.step_1: Contact us to get the <1>IP address of our portal service.</1>
modal.step_2: Follow <1>this guide</1> to point your domain/subdomain to our service.
modal.step_3: Let us know once completed, and share the <1>portal URL</1> you've set up.
modal.step_4: We'll verify and activate your <1>affiliate portal domain.</1>

email_sender_domain.title: Email sender domain
email_sender_domain.description: Using your own domain to send emails can help reduce the risk of them landing in the spam folder
email_sender_domain.label: Email sender domain
email_sender_domain.banner_body: Customizing your email sender domain requires collaboration between us and you. Please reach out via Live chat or email for assistance

remove_watermark.title: Free BLOOP Referral branding removal 😍️
remove_watermark.description: We can help you remove all the BLOOP watermarks from your store for free. Contact us to enjoy a cleaner interface!

banner_app_free.title: Your free deal awaits!
banner_app_free.body: Our new affiliate feature is released! To celebrate, we're giving you FREE lifetime access to BLOOP Refer & Aff but only if you grab the deal now. Click below to keep it free forever!

domain_modal.help_text_default: You'd better use a subdomain (e.g: referral.bsscommerce.com) for better deliverability
domain_modal.help_text_pending: DNS propagation usually takes 24-48 hours. Click <1>Add domain</1> again after verification.
domain_modal.error_invalid: Please enter a valid domain (e.g. marketing.mystore.com)
domain_modal.error_add_failed: Failed to add domain. Please enter a different domain.
domain_modal.error_verify_failed: Domain verification failed. DNS records may not be properly configured yet.
domain_modal.error_verify_failed_hint: Domain verification failed, one or more DNS records are missing or incorrect
domain_modal.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
domain_modal.banner_body: Add these DNS records below to your domain provider's DNS settings. DNS propagation usually takes 24-48 hours.
domain_modal.instruction_login: Log in to your DNS hosting provider (where <1>{{domain}}</1> is managed). Common providers are
domain_modal.instruction_go_to: Go to your <1>DNS control panel / DNS settings</1> section
domain_modal.instruction_enter: Enter those DNS records listed above
domain_modal.footer_contact: Once DNS records are properly configured, your domain is verified. Please <1>contact us</1> if you need any assistance while setting up.
domain_modal.toast_active_updated: Domain is active and has been updated!
domain_modal.toast_domain_added: Domain added! Please configure DNS records.
